summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of sukunaW Gaming Platform completed successfully. Tested user registration, admin functionality, shop system, game mechanics, and transfer features. Backend API tests: 24/24 passed. Frontend integration tests: 12/13 major features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Minor DOM element attachment issue during rapid interactions in transfer to non-existent user test
integration_issues.impact: Does not affect normal user flow, only appears during automated rapid testing

passed_tests: User registration with unique username validation
Admin login (pseudotamine/synapthys5082_) with isAdmin=true verification
Admin panel access and coin addition functionality
Admin add coins to non-existent user shows 'User not found' error
Shop item display and Custom Role purchase (1000 coins)
Shop insufficient funds prevention (tested via backend)
Dodge game canvas loading and start functionality
Transfer coins between users (successful transfer of 100 coins)
Dashboard statistics display (coins, level, roles)
Profile page navigation and data display
Navbar navigation and user level/coins display
Logout and login flow functionality
All backend API endpoints (24/24 tests passed)
Error handling for invalid operations
Authentication and authorization flows
Game score submission and anti-cheat validation
Shop purchase validation and inventory updates
Admin user management and coin distribution
User data persistence and retrieval
Level system XP calculations
Purchase history tracking
